elements.text:
A friend tells a funny joke and you start to laugh really hard. While you're laughing, you feel an uncomfortable tightness in your chest that you've never felt before. 

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: Even though it's hard, I tell myself that this feeling will pass.
I take a deep breath and tell my friend that was a good joke.
I take a sip of water and continue the conversation.
I leave the room so people won't see me.
I want to yell at my friend to be quiet, but I take a deep breath and decide not to.
